items.title: Recursion
items.description: Top-down DP IS memoized recursion; the same recurrence written as a self-call + a cache.

items.title: Greedy Algorithms
items.description: DP is the principled fallback when the greedy-choice property fails (0/1 knapsack, general coin change).

items.title: Time-Space Tradeoffs
items.description: DP buys speed by spending memory on the table; row-rolling and state-compression are textbook ways to trade them back.

items.title: Graphs
items.description: Bellman-Ford shortest path, Floyd-Warshall all-pairs and Viterbi all express as DP over graphs/lattices.

items.title: Big-O Complexity
items.description: DP collapses exponential recursion trees into polynomial DAGs of unique sub-problems — the canonical case study.

items.title: Problem-Solving Patterns
items.description: DP is one of the standard interview-pattern templates (alongside sliding window, two-pointer, greedy, backtracking).
